title: Numbers, Data & Statistics
description: Jak říct čísla, procenta, zlomky a jak mluvit o grafech a datech.
notes: ✓ '3.5' = three point five (NOT three comma five)
✓ '1/3' = one third, '2/3' = two thirds, '3/4' = three quarters
✓ Increase OF 10% (amount) vs increase TO 10% (new level) vs increase BY 10% (change)
⚠️  'a number of' = several (plural verb); 'the number of' = specific count (singular verb)

examples.en: Sales rose by 15% in the third quarter.
examples.cz: Prodeje vzrostly o 15 % ve třetím čtvrtletí.

examples.en: Roughly two thirds of respondents agreed.
The temperature dropped to just under zero.
On average, adults sleep seven to eight hours.
examples.cz: Průměrně spí dospělí sedm až osm hodin.

examples.en: The graph shows a sharp increase followed by a plateau.
examples.cz: Graf ukazuje prudký nárůst následovaný stabilizací.

quiz.sentence: ___ three quarters of students passed the exam.
The number of cars ___ doubled since 2000.

tasks: 1. Read a statistics article and write 5 sentences describing the data in English
2. Describe a graph or chart you know using rise/fall/plateau vocabulary
3. Write 5 sentences using fractions and percentages about Czech Republic facts
